org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.CallFlowToRecv

Packages that use CallFlowToRecv
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.

  • Uses of CallFlowToRecv in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun

    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun that return CallFlowToRecv
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CallFlowToRecv
    HostContext.call(FunVal fun)
    Returns a call flow to call the fun, with nada as the recv and no args.
    CallFlowToRecv
    HostContext.call(Val ownerRecv, int symHandle)
    Returns a call flow to call a method of ownerRecv with no args.
